features.name: interface modport port renaming with dotted syntax
features.description: Code should include an interface with modport declarations using dotted port renaming syntax where internal signals are mapped to different external port names

features.name: multiple modports with different signal mappings
features.description: Code should include an interface with multiple modports where each modport maps the same internal signals to different external port names

features.name: module port typed to interface with specific modport
features.description: Code should include a module port declared with interface type and specific modport selector using dotted notation

features.name: same interface instance passed to modules with different modports
features.description: Code should include a single interface instance being passed to multiple module instances where each module expects a different modport type
